issues.title: 429 Maximum effective tokens exceeded (25M cap)
issues.recurrence: recurred 2026-06-04 (Daily Ambient Context Optimizer 25.12M/25M, prod main) after several absent windows
issues.note: Heavy daily-aggregation workflows intermittently exceed the 25M effective-token cap. Intermittent; depends on run-set size.

issues.title: One failed safe-output item reds the whole safe_outputs job
issues.recurrence: recurred 2026-06-04 on 2 prod wf; dominant variant = add_comment target='*' with no item_number/issue_number/pr_number
issues.note: Agents emit add_comment with configured target='*' but omit the required explicit item_number; framework rejects the item and the partial failure reds an otherwise-successful job.

issues.title: copilot-sdk-driver headless-path failures (auth + tool-permission + session.idle timeout)
issues.recurrence: new variant 2026-06-04: copilot-sdk-tool-permission-lockout — ALL agent tools return 'Permission denied and could not request permission from user', then sdk-driver session.idle 600s timeout (PR Code Quality Reviewer 26968772279). Prior variants: session-auth (06-03), session.idle timeout (06-02).
issues.note: sdk-driver path keeps producing distinct failure modes (auth-info missing, tool permission lockout, idle timeout). Legacy copilot CLI path remains stable.

issues.title: update_pull_request update_branch blocked: GitHub App lacks 'workflows' permission for PRs touching .lock.yml
issues.note: Non-fatal warning this run (PR #36900 / daily-news.lock.yml). update_branch can never succeed for PRs that modify .github/workflows/*.lock.yml without the workflows scope.

issues.title: create_discussion safe-output lacks label + temporary_id fields
issues.note: Product gap surfaced by smoke test: create_discussion cannot attach labels (e.g. ai-generated) or a temporary_id for cross-referencing.

issues.title: Serena MCP server absent from mcp-cli manifest
issues.note: Environment note: manifest exposes only agenticworkflows/mcpscripts/safeoutputs/tavily. Smoke test expects serena. Likely config drift, not a regression.

issues.title: Firewall blocked-request ratio
issues.recurrence: 21.1% blocked (940/4452) this window; hotspots [aw] Failure Investigator 57%, Smoke Copilot 49%
issues.note: By-design SNI/domain denials; no firewall-caused run failure this window.
